creator: protasenko@gmail.com
text:
Yes, this fixed the issue! `cheese` now works fine in gnome-shell environment. Also the 'Users' and other sections of gnome-control-center now work too, except I still have an issue with 'Power' section, but that was there before and looks like configuration issue (possibly related to schema 'org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.power' does not contain a key named 'power-saver-profile-on-low-battery').

Thanks!
